mapper.select: SELECT * FROM teacher_score_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND teacher_id = #{teacherId}
SELECT * FROM teacher_score_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND year = #{year}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teacher_score_record (student_id, defense_group_id, teacher_id, year, item1_score, item2_score, item3_score, item4_score, item5_score, item6_score, total_score, submit_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{defenseGroupId}, #{teacherId}, #{year}, #{item1Score}, #{item2Score}, #{item3Score}, #{item4Score}, #{item5Score}, #{item6Score}, #{totalScore}, #{submitTime})
mapper.select: SELECT tsr.*, s.name as student_name, s.student_no, s.defense_type, t.name as teacher_name, t.teacher_no FROM teacher_score_record tsr LEFT JOIN t_student s ON tsr.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON tsr.teacher_id = t.id ORDER BY tsr.submit_time DESC

SELECT tsr.*, s.name as student_name, s.student_no, s.defense_type, t.name as teacher_name, t.teacher_no FROM teacher_score_record tsr LEFT JOIN t_student s ON tsr.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON tsr.teacher_id = t.id WHERE tsr.year = #{year} ORDER BY tsr.submit_time DESC

SELECT tsr.*, s.name as student_name, s.student_no, s.defense_type, t.name as teacher_name, t.teacher_no FROM teacher_score_record tsr LEFT JOIN t_student s ON tsr.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON tsr.teacher_id = t.id WHERE tsr.id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM teacher_score_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND year = #{year}
